query:
SELECT p.id, p.userId, p.jltEmail, p.personalEmail, p.uniqueAgentId, p.membershipTier, p.agentStatus
FROM agent_crm_profiles p
WHERE p.jltEmail LIKE '%lulu%' OR p.personalEmail LIKE '%lulu%' 
   OR p.jltEmail LIKE '%harris%' OR p.personalEmail LIKE '%harris%';
command:
